name: CSV to Pub/Sub JSON Pipeline
description: Reads a CSV from GCS, dynamically extracts headers, and publishes JSON payloads to Pub/Sub.

parameters.name: input
parameters.label: Input GCS File Path
parameters.helpText: The GCS path to the CSV file (e.g., gs://your-staging-bucket/data.csv)

parameters.name: topic
parameters.label: Output Pub/Sub Topic
parameters.helpText: The Pub/Sub topic to publish to (e.g., projects/your-staging-project/topics/your-topic)
